# Support

Thanks for using ZenPanel.

## Get help

- **Bugs / features:** [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/Foisalislambd/zenpanel/issues)
- **How to contribute:** [CONTRIBUTING.md](./CONTRIBUTING.md)
- **Security:** [SECURITY.md](./SECURITY.md)

## Star the project

If ZenPanel helps your work, a star on [GitHub](https://github.com/Foisalislambd/zenpanel) helps others find it.
